Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************

 The copower model

 In this file, we formalize Proposition 6.9 from the following paper:

   http://www.itu.dk/people/mogel/papers/eec.pdf

 Contents:
 1. Copower adjunction
 1.1. The functors
 1.2. The unit and counit
 1.3. The adjunction
 2. The copower model

 **********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.exponentials.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Cartesian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Examples.CartesianMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentAdjunction.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Limits.EnrichedTerminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Limits.EnrichedBinaryProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Limits.EnrichedPowers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Limits.Examples.SelfEnrichedLimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Limits.Examples.OppositeEnrichedLimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Colimits.EnrichedInitial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Colimits.EnrichedBinaryCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Colimits.EnrichedCopowers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Colimits.CopowerFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Colimits.Examples.SelfEnrichedColimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Colimits.Examples.OppositeEnrichedColimits.
Require Import UniMath.Semantics.EnrichedEffectCalculus.EECModel.

Import MonoidalNotations.
Local Open Scope moncat.
Local Open Scope cat.

Section CopowerModel.
  Context (VC : category)
          (TV : Terminal VC)
          (VP : BinProducts VC)
          (IV : Initial VC)
          (VCP : BinCoproducts VC)
          (expV : Exponentials VP)
          (V : sym_mon_closed_cat := sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV)
          (C : category)
          (r : C)
          (EC : enrichment C V)
          (TC : terminal_enriched EC)
          (IC : initial_enriched EC)
          (powC : enrichment_power EC)
          (copowC : enrichment_copower EC)
          (PC : enrichment_binary_prod EC)
          (CPC : enrichment_binary_coprod EC).

  Opaque V.

  (**
   1. Copower adjunction
   *)

  (**
   1.1. The functors
   *)
  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
functor_data VC C

VP: BinProducts VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
functor_data VC C

TV: Terminal VC

r: C
EC: enrichment C V

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC

∏ a b : VC, VC ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
VC → C
 exact (λ v, copow_ob copowC v r).
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ a b : VC,
VC ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ C ⟦ (λ v : VC, copow_ob copowC v r) a,
  (λ v : VC, copow_ob copowC v r) b ⟧
 exact (λ v₁ v₂ (f : V ⟦ v₁ , v₂ ⟧), copow_mor copowC f r).
  Defined.

powC: enrichment_power EC

PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_functor copow_functor_data

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
# copow_functor_data (identity v) =
identity (copow_functor_data v)

      exact (copow_id_mor copowC v r).
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v₁, v₂, v₃: VC
f: VC ⟦ v₁, v₂ ⟧
g: VC ⟦ v₂, v₃ ⟧
copow_mor copowC (f · g) r =
copow_mor copowC f r · copow_mor copowC g r

      exact (copow_comp_mor copowC f g r).
  Qed.

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC

 exact copow_functor_laws.
  Defined.

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_functor_enrichment
  (λ x y : VC, copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r)

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_functor_enrichment
  (λ x y : VC, copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x : VC,
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r =
enriched_id EC (copow_functor x)
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y z : VC,
enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) x y z
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x z r =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· enriched_comp EC (copow_functor x) 
    (copow_functor y) (copow_functor z)
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ (x y : VC) (f : VC ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr EC (# copow_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V) f
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r

TV: Terminal VC

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x : VC,
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r =
enriched_id EC (copow_functor x)
 
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r =
enriched_id EC (copow_functor x)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
is_copower_enriched EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_functor x) =
enriched_id EC (copow_functor x)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_functor x)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
is_copower_enriched EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))

        exact (pr2 (copowC _ r)).
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_functor x) =
enriched_id EC (copow_functor x)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_functor x)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
internal_id x · copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
internal_id x
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
internal_id x
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
?b =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
internal_id x
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) = ?b

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x x r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r) = ?t2

        apply mor_to_copower_commutes.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
internal_id x
· internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, x ⟧),
(internal_id x
 · internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄) =
(enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC x r)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(internal_id x
 · internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄) =
(enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC x r)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_id x #⊗ h
· internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r)
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ h
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_id x #⊗ h
· (internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ h
· (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_id x #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
      · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
          (copow_ob copowC x r)) #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_id x #⊗ h
· (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · internal_id x #⊗ identity x
· (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r))

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · internal_id x #⊗ identity x
· (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r)

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) =

· (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
      · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
          (copow_ob copowC x r))) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_id x #⊗ identity x
   · (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r))

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) =
internal_id x #⊗ identity x
· (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_id x #⊗ identity x
· (internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_id x #⊗ identity x · internal_eval x x
· mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_lam (mon_lunitor x) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r)

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r) #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r) =
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r

TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r) =
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC x r) =
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· (enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC x r)) =
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· mon_lunitor (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄) =
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lunitor x
· copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)) =
mon_lunitor x · mor_of_copow_ob copowC x r

      apply idpath.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y z : VC,
enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) x y z
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x z r =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· enriched_comp EC (copow_functor x) (copow_functor y)
    (copow_functor z)
 
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
internal_comp x y z · copow_enriched_mor copowC x z r =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
is_copower_enriched EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
internal_comp x y z · copow_enriched_mor copowC x z r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) 
    (copow_ob copowC z r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
is_copower_enriched EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))

        exact (pr2 (copowC _ r)).

    (copow_ob copowC z r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC z r)

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
?b =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) 
     (copow_ob copowC z r)
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
       (pr1 (copowC x r)) 
       (copow_ob copowC z r))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x z r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC z r) = ?t2

        apply mor_to_copower_commutes.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
internal_comp x y z
· internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC z r))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, x ⟧),
(internal_comp x y z
 · internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(internal_comp x y z
 · internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

a: V

(internal_comp x y z

#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄) =
?b

r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
?b =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) 
      (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) 
        (copow_ob copowC z r))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

internal_comp x y z #⊗ h
· internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r)
  #⊗ identity x

?b

r: C

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_comp x y z #⊗ h
· (internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)) =

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_comp x y z #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (internal_eval x z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)) =
?b

a: V

· (internal_eval x z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r) =

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp x y z #⊗ identity x
· (internal_eval x z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r) =
?b

identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp x y z #⊗ identity x
   · (internal_eval x z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r)) =

r: C

copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_comp x y z #⊗ identity x · internal_eval x z
· mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r = ?t2

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · internal_eval y z) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r = 
?t2

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· internal_eval y z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r = 
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · internal_eval y z · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (internal_eval y z
         · mor_of_copow_ob copowC z r))) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · ((copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
          · is_copower_enriched_map EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r)) (copow_ob copowC z r))
         #⊗ identity y
         · internal_eval y
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)))) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · ((copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
          · is_copower_enriched_map EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r)) (copow_ob copowC z r))
         #⊗ identity y
         · internal_eval y
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)))) = 
?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
?b =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) 
      (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) 
        (copow_ob copowC z r))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · ((copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
          · is_copower_enriched_map EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r)) (copow_ob copowC z r))
         #⊗ identity y
         · internal_eval y
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)))) = 
?b

· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · is_copower_enriched_map EC y r
             (pr1 (copowC y r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)
           #⊗ identity y
         · internal_eval y
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)))) =

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (is_copower_enriched_map EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)
            #⊗ identity y
            · internal_eval y
                (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))))) =

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (internal_lam
              (identity
                 (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
                  copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
               #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                    (pr1 (copowC y r))
               · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                   (copow_ob copowC z r))
            #⊗ identity y
            · internal_eval y
                (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))))) =
?b

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
               copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                 (pr1 (copowC y r))
            · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                (copow_ob copowC z r))))) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
               copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                 (pr1 (copowC y r))
            · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                (copow_ob copowC z r))))) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
      (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄) =
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
               copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                 (pr1 (copowC y r))
            · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                (copow_ob copowC z r)))))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC z r) #⊗ identity x)
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄) =
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
               copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                 (pr1 (copowC y r))
            · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                (copow_ob copowC z r)))))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
   #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC z r) #⊗ identity x)
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄) =
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
               copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                 (pr1 (copowC y r))
            · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                (copow_ob copowC z r)))))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· ((copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
    #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
   · (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
        (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
      #⊗ identity x
      · (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
           (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)
         #⊗ identity x
         · internal_eval x
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)))) =
identity ((y ⊸ z) ⊗ (x ⊸ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
   · (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
      · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
         · (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r),
               copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
                 (pr1 (copowC y r))
            · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
                (copow_ob copowC z r)))))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)
      #⊗ identity x
      · internal_eval x
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))) =
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r
            ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r))
         · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
             (copow_ob copowC z r))))

TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)
      #⊗ identity x
      · internal_eval x
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), 
            copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r))
         · enriched_comp EC r 
             (pr1 (copowC y r)) 
             (copow_ob copowC z r))))

(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r
        (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC z r)
      #⊗ identity x
      · internal_eval x
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))) = ?b

· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · (internal_lam

     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · (identity

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
      · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
          (copow_ob copowC z r))) = ?b0

          
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
  (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
#⊗ identity x
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC z r)) = ?t2

  (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)

· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))

  (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity
  ((EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
   ⊗ (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC x r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC z r) = ?t2

identity
  ((EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
   ⊗ (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC x r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· (enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
     (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC z r)) = ?t2

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
enriched_comp EC (copow_ob copowC x r)
  (copow_ob copowC y r) (copow_ob copowC z r)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lassociator
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC y r)
    (copow_ob copowC z r) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· (identity
     ((EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
      ⊗ (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC x r, copow_ob copowC y r
         ⦄))
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · (mon_lassociator
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r
         ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
      · identity
          (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r,
           copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
             (copow_ob copowC y r)
      · enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC y r)
          (copow_ob copowC z r))) = ?b

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· identity
    ((EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
     ⊗ (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC x r, copow_ob copowC y r
        ⦄))
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· mon_lassociator
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC y r)
    (copow_ob copowC z r) = ?b

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r) #⊗ identity x
· identity
    ((EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
     ⊗ (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC x r, copow_ob copowC y r
        ⦄))
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· mon_lassociator
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄) = ?y'

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · identity
     ((EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
      ⊗ (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC x r, copow_ob copowC y r
         ⦄)))
#⊗ (identity x
    · copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· mon_lassociator
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄) = ?y'

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
 #⊗ copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· mon_lassociator
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC x r) ⦄) = ?y'

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))) =
?y'

        apply idpath.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC y r)
    (copow_ob copowC z r) =
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r
            ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r
              (pr1 (copowC y r))
         · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
             (copow_ob copowC z r))))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC y r)
    (copow_ob copowC z r) =
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC y r))
    (copow_ob copowC z r)

· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r) =
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
· identity

copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC

a: V

mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
   #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
       #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
   · identity
       (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r
        ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
          (copow_ob copowC y r)) =
mon_lassociator (y ⊸ z) (x ⊸ y) x
· (identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
      · identity
          (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r
           ⦄)
        #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
    #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r) =
identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
   · identity
       (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
     #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ identity ((x ⊸ y) ⊗ x)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r) =
identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
   · identity
       (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
     #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
   · identity
       (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
     #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ identity ((x ⊸ y) ⊗ x)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity (y ⊸ z) #⊗ internal_eval x y
· copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r #⊗ identity y
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ identity ((x ⊸ y) ⊗ x)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)

· identity

  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) =

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ identity ((x ⊸ y) ⊗ x)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval x y
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)

copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r

       (copow_ob copowC y r)

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ identity ((x ⊸ y) ⊗ x)
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
   #⊗ internal_eval x y
   · identity
       (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
     #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC y z r
#⊗ identity ((x ⊸ y) ⊗ x)
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
   #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
       #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))

        ⦄)

          (copow_ob copowC y r))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
#⊗ internal_eval x y
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) =
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
    #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)))
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(identity
   (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
 · identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))
#⊗ (internal_eval x y
    · copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r))) =
(identity
   (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
 · identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄))
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
    #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
        (copow_ob copowC y r))

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity
  (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC y r), copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
#⊗ (internal_eval x y
    · copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r))) =
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC y r, copow_ob copowC z r ⦄)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
    #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_eval x y
· copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
internal_eval x y
· copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
internal_eval x y
· copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
?b =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)
