C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
internal_eval x y
· copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r)) = ?b

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
?b =
internal_eval x y
· copower_cocone_mor EC y r (pr1 (copowC y r))

        exact (copow_enriched_mor_commute copowC x y r).
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
(copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC y r) #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
      · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
          (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)) =

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))

      apply idpath.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ (x y : VC) (f : VC ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr EC (# copow_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V) f
· copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC (copow_mor copowC f r) =
internal_from_arr f · copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_copower_enriched EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC (copow_mor copowC f r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC y r) =
internal_from_arr f · copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r 
    (pr1 (copowC x r)) (copow_ob copowC y r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_copower_enriched EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))

        exact (pr2 (copowC _ r)).

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC (copow_mor copowC f r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r) = ?b

r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC (copow_mor copowC f r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r) = ?b

        apply copow_mor_commute.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor x · f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r) =
internal_from_arr f · copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, x ⟧),
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor x · (f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
(internal_from_arr f
 · internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor x · (f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =

 · internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))

C: category
r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor x · (f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
internal_from_arr f #⊗ h
· internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r)
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (mon_lunitor x · (f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
internal_from_arr f #⊗ h
· internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r)
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lunitor x · (f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)) =
internal_from_arr f #⊗ h
· (internal_postcomp x (mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))

h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lunitor x · (f · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r))
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)) =
internal_from_arr f #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (internal_eval x y · mor_of_copow_ob copowC y r)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_lam (mon_lunitor x · f) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x y = mon_lunitor x · f

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
f: VC ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
mon_lunitor x · f = mon_lunitor x · f

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition copow_functor_enrichment
    : functor_enrichment
        copow_functor
        (self_enrichment V)
        EC
    := (λ x y, copow_enriched_mor _ _ _ _)
       ,,
       copow_functor_enrichment_laws.

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
functor_data C VC

→ VC ⟦ (λ c : C, EC ⦃ r, c ⦄) a,
  (λ c : C, EC ⦃ r, c ⦄) b ⟧
 exact (λ c₁ c₂ f, postcomp_arr EC r f).
  Defined.

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
c: C
postcomp_arr EC r (identity c) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, c ⦄)

      apply (postcomp_arr_id EC).

TV: Terminal VC

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
c₁, c₂, c₃: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ c₂, c₃ ⟧
postcomp_arr EC r (f · g) =
postcomp_arr EC r f · postcomp_arr EC r g

      apply (postcomp_arr_comp EC).
  Qed.

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

  (λ x y : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x : C,
enriched_id EC x
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x x) =
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) (hom_l_functor x)
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y z : C,
enriched_comp EC x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
#⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) 
    (hom_l_functor x) (hom_l_functor y)
    (hom_l_functor z)
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
  (# hom_l_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr EC f
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

enriched_id EC x
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x x) =
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) (hom_l_functor x)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
enriched_id EC x
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x x) =
internal_id (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_id EC x
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) =
internal_id (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

(enriched_id EC x
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) =
internal_id (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) #⊗ h

enriched_id EC x #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x x

TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id EC x #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x x =
enriched_id EC x #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x x

      apply idpath.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y z : C,
enriched_comp EC x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
#⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) (hom_l_functor x)
    (hom_l_functor y) (hom_l_functor z)
 
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp EC x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
#⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· internal_comp (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_comp EC x y z
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · internal_comp (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)

TV: Terminal VC

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_comp EC x y z
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · internal_comp (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x z)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
        ((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
     ((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
     ((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
    ((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
  #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y) #⊗ h)
· identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

C: category
r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
   #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y) #⊗ h)
   · (identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))) =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
   #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y) #⊗ h)
   · (identity ((EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄))) =
?b

TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) = ?t20

TV: Terminal VC

IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) = ?t20

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) = 
?t20

r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC

PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
#⊗ (identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
    · enriched_comp EC r x y)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄) = ?t2

#⊗ (identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h)

  #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y

· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
   #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) =

  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r y z)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, z ⦄)) =

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z = ?t2

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h)
   · (identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
      · enriched_comp EC r y z)) =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z =
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp EC r x z =
(identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r x z =
(identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r x z) =
(identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
      · enriched_comp EC r y z))

TV: Terminal VC

IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r x z) =
identity ((EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
      · enriched_comp EC r y z))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp EC x y z #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r x z =
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
   · enriched_comp EC r y z)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z =
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
   · enriched_comp EC r y z)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z =
mon_lassociator (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp EC r x y
· enriched_comp EC r y z

      apply idpath.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
  (# hom_l_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr EC f
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr EC r f) =
enriched_from_arr EC f
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧),
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr EC r f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
(enriched_from_arr EC f
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr EC r f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
(enriched_from_arr EC f
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr EC r f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr EC f #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr EC r f)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr EC f #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr EC r f)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr EC f #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lunitor (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) · postcomp_arr EC r f)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr EC f #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄))

      · enriched_from_arr EC f
        #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

        apply id_left.

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC f #⊗ h =
enriched_from_arr EC f #⊗ h

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

TV: Terminal VC

r: C

IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
functor_enrichment hom_l_functor EC
  (self_enrichment V)

IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC

  (self_enrichment V)

TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
(λ FE : functor_enrichment_data hom_l_functor EC
          (self_enrichment V),
 is_functor_enrichment FE) 
  ?pr1

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
functor_enrichment_data hom_l_functor EC
  (self_enrichment V)
 exact (λ x y, internal_lam (enriched_comp EC _ _ _)).
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
(λ FE : functor_enrichment_data hom_l_functor EC
          (self_enrichment V),
 is_functor_enrichment FE)
  (λ x y : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y))
 exact hom_l_functor_enrichment_laws.
  Defined.

  (**
   1.2. The unit and counit
   *)
  Definition copow_adjunction_unit_data
    : nat_trans_data
        (functor_identity VC)
        (copow_functor ∙ hom_l_functor)
    := λ v, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r.

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment copow_adjunction_unit_data
  (functor_id_enrichment (self_enrichment V))
  (functor_comp_enrichment copow_functor_enrichment
     hom_l_functor_enrichment)

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment copow_adjunction_unit_data
  (functor_id_enrichment (self_enrichment V))
  (functor_comp_enrichment copow_functor_enrichment
     hom_l_functor_enrichment)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y : VC,
functor_comp_enrichment copow_functor_enrichment
  hom_l_functor_enrichment x y
· precomp_arr (self_enrichment V)
    ((copow_functor ∙ hom_l_functor) y)
    (copow_adjunction_unit_data x) =
functor_id_enrichment (self_enrichment V) x y
· postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V)
    (functor_identity VC x)
    (copow_adjunction_unit_data y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· internal_lam
    (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
       (copow_ob copowC y r))
· precomp_arr (self_enrichment V)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
    (copow_adjunction_unit_data x) =
identity (x ⊸ y)
· postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) x
    (copow_adjunction_unit_data y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· internal_lam
    (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
       (copow_ob copowC y r))
· precomp_arr (self_enrichment V)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
    (copow_adjunction_unit_data x) =
postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) x
  (copow_adjunction_unit_data y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
· internal_lam
    (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
       (copow_ob copowC y r))
· internal_lam
    (identity
       ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
        ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
     #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
     · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
         (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)) =
internal_lam
  (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, x ⟧),
(copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · internal_lam
     (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
        (copow_ob copowC y r))
 · internal_lam
     (identity
        ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
         ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
      #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
internal_lam
  (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · internal_lam
     (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
        (copow_ob copowC y r))
 · internal_lam
     (identity
        ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
         ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
      #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
internal_lam
  (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
       (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
· internal_lam
    (identity
       ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
        ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
     #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
     · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
         (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
internal_lam
  (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
internal_lam
  (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)
#⊗ h · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
       (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
· internal_lam
    (identity
       ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
        ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
     #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
     · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
         (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity (x ⊸ y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
       (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
· internal_lam
    (identity
       ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
        ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
     #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
     · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
         (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
  #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, x ⟧
identity (x ⊸ y) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (internal_eval x y · copow_adjunction_unit_data y)
   #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
        (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
   · (internal_lam
        (identity
           ((EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
            ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
         #⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
         · internal_eval
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC x r ⦄)
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))
      #⊗ identity x
      · internal_eval x
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)))

       (copow_ob copowC y r)) =

r: C

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC

#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
(copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r) #⊗ identity x
· internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· (is_copower_enriched_map EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
     (copow_ob copowC y r) #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
      · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
          (copow_ob copowC y r)) #⊗ identity x
   · internal_eval x (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC y r ⦄))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
       (copow_ob copowC y r))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r #⊗ identity x
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC x r), copow_ob copowC y r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: VC
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copow_adjunction_unit_data x
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC x r)
    (copow_ob copowC y r) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC x y r
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC x r (pr1 (copowC x r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC x r))
    (copow_ob copowC y r)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_nat_trans (functor_identity VC)
  (copow_functor ∙ hom_l_functor)
  (λ v : VC, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r)

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_nat_trans (functor_identity VC)
  (copow_functor ∙ hom_l_functor)
  (λ v : VC, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r)

    exact (is_nat_trans_from_enrichment
             copow_adjunction_unit_enrichment).
  Qed.

  ?t

TV: Terminal VC

IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_data (functor_identity VC)
  (copow_functor ∙ hom_l_functor)
 exact (λ v, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r).
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_nat_trans (functor_identity VC)
  (copow_functor ∙ hom_l_functor)
  (λ v : VC, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r)
 exact copow_adjunction_unit_laws.
  Defined.

  Definition copow_adjunction_counit_data
    : nat_trans_data
        (hom_l_functor ∙ copow_functor)
        (functor_identity C)
    := λ x, copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x.

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment copow_adjunction_counit_data
  (functor_comp_enrichment hom_l_functor_enrichment
     copow_functor_enrichment)
  (functor_id_enrichment EC)

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment copow_adjunction_counit_data
  (functor_comp_enrichment hom_l_functor_enrichment
     copow_functor_enrichment)
  (functor_id_enrichment EC)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y : C,
functor_id_enrichment EC x y
· precomp_arr EC (functor_identity C y)
    (copow_adjunction_counit_data x) =
functor_comp_enrichment hom_l_functor_enrichment
  copow_functor_enrichment x y
· postcomp_arr EC ((hom_l_functor ∙ copow_functor) x)
    (copow_adjunction_counit_data y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
∏ x y : C,
functor_id_enrichment EC x y
· precomp_arr EC (functor_identity C y)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x) =
functor_comp_enrichment hom_l_functor_enrichment
  copow_functor_enrichment x y
· postcomp_arr EC ((hom_l_functor ∙ copow_functor) x)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
is_copower_enriched EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
  (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC 
    (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· copow_enriched_mor copowC 
    (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC 
    (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
is_copower_enriched EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
  (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))

      exact (pr2 (copowC _ r)).
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
· copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧),
(precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
 · postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
 · postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· (precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
   · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
 · postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· ((precomp_arr EC y
      (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
    · (postcomp_arr EC
         (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
         (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
       · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· ((precomp_arr EC y
      (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) = 
?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
 · (copow_enriched_mor copowC 
      (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
    · (postcomp_arr EC
         (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
         (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
       · is_copower_enriched_map EC 
           (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

identity (EC ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· ((precomp_arr EC y
      (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
    · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r

   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

(precomp_arr EC y (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) = ?t2

      apply precomp_copow_on_enriched_mor_commute.

 · (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r

           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)))

    · (postcomp_arr EC
         (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (postcomp_arr EC
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
        #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)))
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
     (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (postcomp_arr EC
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
         #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
         · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp EC r x y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄))) =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄))) =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC

V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · mon_lunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
