V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · ((enriched_from_arr EC
         (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
       · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y
        #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y
         #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
         · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (internal_lam
           (identity
              (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
            #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
                 (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
            · enriched_comp EC r
                (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)
         #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
         · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y))) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)) =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
?b =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC 
              (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y)) = ?b

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       y) = ?t2

TV: Terminal VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y =
?t2

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y =
?t2

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r) ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) y =
?t2

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· (postcomp_arr EC (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r) ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       y) = ?t2

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· (enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
     (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
   · postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
   · (enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
      · postcomp_arr EC r
          (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y))) =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
   · (enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         · enriched_from_arr EC
             (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
           #⊗ identity
                (EC ⦃ r,
                 copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r) y))) =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
     copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
· mon_linvunitor
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
    y =
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_linvunitor
  (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · identity
          (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
           copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
        #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
          (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
    y =
mon_linvunitor
  (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_linvunitor
  (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
         (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
       · (identity
            (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
             copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
          #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
               (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
          · enriched_comp EC r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
              (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)))
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r) y)) =
mon_linvunitor
  (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · (identity
         (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
          copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
       #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
            (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       · enriched_comp EC r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
           (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)))
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r) y) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
    y =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) y

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(identity I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y))
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) =
(identity I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y))
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC 
       (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) = ?b

  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
            copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
             (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))) = 
?b

      apply idpath.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
            copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
             (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
            copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
             (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC 
        (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
      #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
            copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC 
              (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
             (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)))

· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)

enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
   #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
   #⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   · identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
     #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r y)
#⊗ identity
     (((EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) ⊸ (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)) ⊗ (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))
· identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
        (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      · (identity
           (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
            copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
         #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
              (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
         · enriched_comp EC r
             (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
             (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) =
identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · (identity
         (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
          copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
       #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
            (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       · enriched_comp EC r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
           (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
#⊗ internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r), y ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) =
identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
#⊗ (internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
    · copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))) =
identity (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r, y ⦄)
#⊗ (copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
      (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    · identity
        (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
         copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    · enriched_comp EC r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
        (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
· copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
     copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
(copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
   r
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
     (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
     copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity
    (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
     copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC

VCP: BinCoproducts VC

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
     (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)) =
copow_enriched_mor copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄)
  r #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
  (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
  (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄) =
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r),
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄) =
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)

    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, EC ⦃ r, x ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r),
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r) =
identity
  (EC ⦃ copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r,
   copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r ⦄)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, y ⦄) r)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_nat_trans (hom_l_functor ∙ copow_functor)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ x : C, copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)

  
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
is_nat_trans (hom_l_functor ∙ copow_functor)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ x : C, copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)

    exact (is_nat_trans_from_enrichment
             copow_adjunction_counit_enrichment).
  Qed.

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
· copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r (copow_ob copowC v r) =
identity (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
is_copower_enriched EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
   · copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r 
    (pr1 (copowC v r)) (copow_ob copowC v r) =
enriched_from_arr EC (identity (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r 
    (pr1 (copowC v r)) (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
is_copower_enriched EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))

        exact (pr2 (copowC _ r)).

TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
   · copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
enriched_from_arr EC (identity (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
   · copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
   · copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
?b =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r 
    (pr1 (copowC v r)) (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
   · copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) = ?b

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
   · copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) = ?y'

        
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
copow_mor copowC (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r) r
· copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r (copow_ob copowC v r) =
?t2

        apply arr_to_copower_precomp.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (arr_to_copower EC v r (pr2 (copowC v r))
     (internal_lam
        (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
         · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
      · internal_postcomp v
          (postcomp_arr EC r
             (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
                (copow_ob copowC v r)))))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC

V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (arr_to_copower EC v r (pr2 (copowC v r))
     (internal_lam
        (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
         · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
      · internal_postcomp v
          (postcomp_arr EC r
             (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
                (copow_ob copowC v r)))))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) = ?b
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
?b =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r 
    (pr1 (copowC v r)) (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_from_arr EC
  (arr_to_copower EC v r (pr2 (copowC v r))
     (internal_lam
        (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
         · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
      · internal_postcomp v
          (postcomp_arr EC r
             (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
                (copow_ob copowC v r)))))
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) = ?b

        apply arr_to_copower_commutes.
      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
   · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
· internal_postcomp v
    (postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r))) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, v ⟧),
(internal_lam
   (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
    · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
 · internal_postcomp v
     (postcomp_arr EC r
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
           (copow_ob copowC v r)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) =
(enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
     (copow_ob copowC v r)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, v ⟧
(internal_lam
   (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
    · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
 · internal_postcomp v
     (postcomp_arr EC r
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
           (copow_ob copowC v r)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) =
(enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
     (copow_ob copowC v r)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, v ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
   · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r) #⊗ h
· internal_postcomp v
    (postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r))) #⊗ identity v
· internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ h
· is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ identity v
· internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, v ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor v
   · (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
      · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)) #⊗ h
· (internal_postcomp v
     (postcomp_arr EC r
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
           (copow_ob copowC v r))) #⊗ identity v
   · internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ h
· (is_copower_enriched_map EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
     (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ identity v
   · internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, v ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor v
   · (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
      · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (internal_eval v
        (EC ⦃ r,
         copow_ob copowC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
      · postcomp_arr EC r
          (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
             (copow_ob copowC v r))) #⊗ identity v
   · internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
      · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
          (copow_ob copowC v r)) #⊗ identity v
   · internal_eval v (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄))

      
VC: category

VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, v ⟧
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor v
   · (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
      · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)) #⊗ h
· (internal_eval v
     (EC ⦃ r,
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
        r ⦄)
   · postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r))) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, v ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (mon_lunitor v
     · (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
        · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
            (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
  #⊗ identity v
· (internal_eval v
     (EC ⦃ r,
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
        r ⦄)
   · postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r))) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (mon_lunitor v

  (mon_lunitor v

       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r))) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ identity v
· (identity
     (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
internal_lam
  (mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
   · mor_of_copow_ob copowC
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
#⊗ identity v
· internal_eval v
    (EC ⦃ r,
     copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
     ⦄)
· postcomp_arr EC r
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ identity v
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
· mor_of_copow_ob copowC
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC r
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r) #⊗ identity v
· identity
    (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC v r), copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
· mor_of_copow_ob copowC
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC r
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC

IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
· enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
mon_lunitor v · mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
· mor_of_copow_ob copowC
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC r
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
· (enriched_id EC (copow_ob copowC v r)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC v r))
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
mon_lunitor v
· (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
   · (mor_of_copow_ob copowC
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
      · postcomp_arr EC r
          (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
             (copow_ob copowC v r))))

copowC: enrichment_copower EC

v: VC
mon_lunitor v
· copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r)) =
mon_lunitor v
· (mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
   · (mor_of_copow_ob copowC
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
      · postcomp_arr EC r

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r)) =
mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
· (mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
   · postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r)))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
copower_cocone_mor EC v r (pr1 (copowC v r))
· identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄) =
mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r
· (mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
   · postcomp_arr EC r
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r)))

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄) =
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  r
· postcomp_arr EC r
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  r
· postcomp_arr EC r
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  r
· (mon_linvunitor
     (EC ⦃ r,
      copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
        r ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr EC
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
          (copow_ob copowC v r))
     #⊗ identity
          (EC ⦃ r,
           copow_ob copowC
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP

r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  r
· mon_linvunitor
    (EC ⦃ r,
     copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
     ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r,
        copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r,
        copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)

· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r,
        copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)

· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
           (copow_ob copowC v r))
      #⊗ identity
           (EC ⦃ r,
            copow_ob copowC
              (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (copow_ob copowC
             (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
          (copow_ob copowC v r))) =

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
        (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r,
         copow_ob copowC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
mon_lunitor (EC ⦃ r, pr1 (copowC v r) ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
        (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r,
         copow_ob copowC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
(enriched_from_arr EC
   (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
      (copow_ob copowC v r))
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
     (copow_ob copowC v r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)

expV: Exponentials VP

identity I_{ V}
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
        (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r,
         copow_ob copowC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
     (copow_ob copowC v r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)

#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
        (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r,

       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =

  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
     (copow_ob copowC v r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· (is_copower_enriched_map EC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
     (copow_ob copowC v r)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄))

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
        (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r,
         copow_ob copowC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
     (copow_ob copowC v r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (EC
         ⦃ pr1
             (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r),
         copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
           (pr1
              (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
                 r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1
             (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
          (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄))

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· (enriched_from_arr EC
     (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
        (copow_ob copowC v r))
   #⊗ identity
        (EC ⦃ r,
         copow_ob copowC
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
       (copow_ob copowC v r)) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
     (copow_ob copowC v r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· (identity
     (EC
      ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r),
      copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC
        (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
        (pr1
           (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
       (copow_ob copowC v r))

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
v: VC
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
       (copow_ob copowC v r))
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r,
        copow_ob copowC
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r
    (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r)
    (copow_ob copowC v r) =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r
     (copow_ob copowC v r))
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
· identity
    (EC
     ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r),
     copow_ob copowC v r ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC v r ⦄) r))
    (copow_ob copowC v r)

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· postcomp_arr EC r (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
