C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· (mon_linvunitor
     (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr EC
       (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
     #⊗ identity
          (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC r
       (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r) x) =
identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· mon_linvunitor
    (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x = identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· enriched_from_arr EC
    (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
  #⊗ identity
       (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x = identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
      #⊗ identity
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)

r: C

TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
   · (enriched_from_arr EC
        (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
      #⊗ identity
           (EC ⦃ r, copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r ⦄)
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r) x)) =
mon_linvunitor (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

TV: Terminal VC

C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x =
(enriched_from_arr EC
   (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
 · is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) x)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x =
enriched_from_arr EC

#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· is_copower_enriched_map EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
    (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) x
  #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)

    x =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), x ⦄)
      #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
           (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
      · enriched_comp EC r
          (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) x)
   #⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄))

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· (identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), x ⦄)
   #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
        (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
   · enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
       x)

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ identity (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄)
· identity (EC ⦃ pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r), x ⦄)
  #⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
       (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) x

      
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
x: C
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ mor_of_copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
· enriched_comp EC r (copow_ob copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)
    x =
enriched_from_arr EC
  (copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
#⊗ copower_cocone_mor EC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r
     (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r))
· enriched_comp EC r (pr1 (copowC (EC ⦃ r, x ⦄) r)) x

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat

CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
adjunction VC C

form_adjunction' copow_adjunction_data
 exact copow_adjunction_laws.
  Defined.

  (self_enrichment
     (sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV)) EC

VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment
  (λ v : VC, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r)
  (functor_id_enrichment
     (self_enrichment
        (sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV)))
  (functor_comp_enrichment ?Goal ?Goal0)
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment
  (λ x : C, copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
  (functor_comp_enrichment ?Goal0 ?Goal)
  (functor_id_enrichment EC)

functor_enrichment copow_functor

     (sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV)) EC
 exact copow_functor_enrichment.

r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC

  (self_enrichment
     (sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV))
 exact hom_l_functor_enrichment.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment
  (λ v : VC, mor_of_copow_ob copowC v r)
  (functor_id_enrichment
     (self_enrichment
        (sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV)))
  (functor_comp_enrichment copow_functor_enrichment
     hom_l_functor_enrichment)
 exact copow_adjunction_unit_enrichment.
    
VC: category
TV: Terminal VC
VP: BinProducts VC
IV: Initial VC
VCP: BinCoproducts VC
expV: Exponentials VP
V:= sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
r: C
EC: enrichment C V
TC: terminal_enriched EC
IC: initial_enriched EC
powC: enrichment_power EC
copowC: enrichment_copower EC
PC: enrichment_binary_prod EC
CPC: enrichment_binary_coprod EC
nat_trans_enrichment
  (λ x : C, copow_on_enriched_mor copowC r x)
  (functor_comp_enrichment hom_l_functor_enrichment
     copow_functor_enrichment)
  (functor_id_enrichment EC)
 exact copow_adjunction_counit_enrichment.
  Defined.

  Definition copow_enriched_adjunction
    : enriched_adjunction
        (self_enrichment (sym_mon_closed_cartesian_cat VC VP TV expV))
        EC
    := copow_adjunction ,, copow_adjunction_enrichment.

  (**
   2. The copower model
   *)
  Definition copow_eec_model
    : eec_model
    := VC
       ,,
       TV
       ,,
       VP
       ,,
       expV
       ,,
       C
       ,,
       EC
       ,,
       copow_enriched_adjunction
       ,,
       TC
       ,,
       IC
       ,,
       powC
       ,,
       copowC
       ,,
       PC
       ,,
       CPC.

  Definition copow_eec_plus_model
    : eec_plus_model
    := copow_eec_model ,, IV ,, VCP.
End CopowerModel.
